user_query: I'm a fitness enthusiast and I'm looking for energetic music to keep me motivated during my workouts. Can you recommend some high-energy playlists and artists? It would also be great if you could share some trivia facts about the benefits of exercise and physical activity.

TaskList.description: Search for high-energy music playlists and artists suitable for workouts.
Retrieve trivia facts about the benefits of exercise and physical activity.
